# Prompt Area

> A production-grade React textarea component with trigger-based chips (@mentions, /commands, #tags), inline markdown, and file attachments. Distributed as a shadcn registry component.

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://prompt-area.com/r/prompt-area.json
```

## What It Does

- **Trigger-based chips**: Type `@`, `/`, or `#` to invoke mentions, commands, and tags that resolve into structured chips
- **Inline markdown**: Live preview of **bold**, *italic*, lists, and auto-linked URLs
- **File & image attachments**: Paste screenshots or attach files with thumbnails and loading states
- **Undo/redo**: Full history stack with Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Shift+Z
- **Auto-grow**: Textarea expands on focus, shrinks on blur
- **Accessible**: ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, screen reader support
- **Dark mode**: Full light/dark theme via CSS variables
- **Zero extra dependencies**: Only React + shadcn/tailwind

## Links

- [Documentation](https://prompt-area.com)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/team-gpt/prompt-area)
- [Full LLM Documentation](https://prompt-area.com/llms-full.txt)
